runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 7th over 350m at this track beaten 4 lengths (19.27) behind Cyclone Tim in a Grade 5 on April 9. Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 7th over 350m at this track beaten 4 lengths (19.27) behind Cyclone Tim in a Grade 5 on April 9. Looks a strong winning hope.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished last in a Grade 5 on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Enter Warp Speed beaten 3 lengths (16.75). Has a strong record from box 2, including two wins. Go close.

runners.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Bogie Becker at this track last start over 300m (16.82). Has to be respected.

runners.formComment: Missed the frame latest (19.59) when eighth over 350m at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (19.59) when eighth over 350m at this track in a Grade 5. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from six starts. Looking to others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced with a loose muzzle for the entire event.
Severely checked at the first turn and lost ground.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 352m at Q Lakeside in a handy (19.54), beating Cake Is Great. Will find this a bit tougher, others have better credentials.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (31.12) at Q Parklands in a Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 23 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Will need the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out and collided rounding the turn out of the back straight.

runners.formComment: Finished third (16.72) at this track last time making it four placings in a row. Jumps from the outside. One of the better hopes.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Sweet Embrace beaten 3.5 lengths (16.82) in a Grade 5. This appears within her reach.

formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 4th on April 6 over 300m at this track behind Sweet Embrace beaten 3.5 lengths (16.82) in a Grade 5. This appears within her reach.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room exiting the back straight and contacted the running rail.

runners.formComment: Looks close to another win after her success on March 12 at this track over 350m. Last start was fourth over 350m in 19.45, behind Kisses For Me. Forward showing expected.

runners.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 457m at Q Lakeside. Needs to find a bit more to test these.
